---
title: "The Black Band Disease Metagenome"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
## Background 





## Assembly 
In the *flye* directory, we made a symbolic link to the BBD read data.
```
ln -s /pvol/data/metagenome_assembly/bbd_0.1.fastq.gz .
``` 
Before created a shell script containing the script below. 
```
#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --time=720
#SBATCH --ntasks=12 --mem=10gb

echo "Starting flye bbd in $(pwd) at $(date)"

flye --nano-hq bbd_0.1.fastq.gz --threads 12 --out-dir bbd --meta

echo "Finished flye bbd in $(pwd) at $(date)"
```
*job 511*
